title: Té Amo — Tea and Art House: the most operationally-specified plan you ever wrote and then walked away from
html:
Question

"What was I writing about in 2022–2023 that I forgot?"

The forgotten thread: Té Amo — Tea and Art House

A prior query (forgotten thread from 2022 2023) already surfaced legacy-code translation as an AI wedge — the COBOL line in 2023 05 13 ideas startup dump. That's covered. This is the next layer down.

On December 29, 2023 you wrote the research dump (2023 12 29 te amo tea and art house) — LA permitting bookmarks, LA Herb + Wild Terra herb suppliers, Talavera Salazar heart-shape ceramics ("corazones" line) locked in as the visual identity before the menu was nailed.

On December 30, 2023 you wrote the operational plan (2023 12 30 current thoughts on te amo tea and art house). It's not a vibe doc. It's a spec:

  • Co-operator named: Jacoby. Explicitly worried about "sustainability of myself and jacoby running it."
  • 30+ herbs/teas drafted (hierba buena, manzanilla, mullein, elderberry, arnica, hibiscus, lemongrass, yerba mate, cacao tea); no-Nestlé Latin American hot chocolate sourcing rule; food architecture intentionally Mexican-American (conchas, lentejas, caldo de pollo, sopa de fideo, sopa de verduras).
  • Pricing locked: $4.50 drip/tea → $6 cacao/yerba mate, $5–9 food, "create your own blend" $5 + $1 per add-in, group pot $15.
  • GTM strategy: 2-month pop-up at farmers markets / art shows as the low risk practice run before brick-and-mortar — "if it tanks, good to know and quit investing without so much of a loss."
  • Pre-launch checklist: 1000 sq ft target, food-handler / entertainment / public-health permits, LLC, resale cert, suppliers, ceramicists, bakery partner.

Then the thread went dark. Across all of 2024, 2025, and 2026, Té Amo appears zero times as a project. Jacoby reappears only as Valeria's partner in 2025 06 22 wedding list for now and as an essay reviewer in 2025 06 29 uclamphmissiondraft — never again as a co-operator. wiki/projects/te-amo.md exists only because today's ingest stubbed it.

Why this one is heavier than COBOL

The COBOL forgotten thread was thesis-rich, plan-poor — one line in an IDEAS dump, downstream of a strong philosophical frame, never specified. Té Amo is the inverse: plan-rich, thesis-poor. You wrote the operating manual — partner, menu, pricing, GTM, permits — without ever writing the market thesis. Structurally, the 2023-12-30 doc is the same kind of artifact as the Rankett prep guide — a real pre-launch worry-list with named partners and unit economics. You only produce that when a thread has graduated from idea to plan. And then you put the plan down and walked into OSU senior year and the China chapter.

Three other forgotten 2022–2023 threads (lesser, worth naming)

  • The dream-recording app appears in three separate idea dumps — 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream (Oct 2022), 2023 05 13 ideas startup dump (May 2023), 2024 12 28 ideas dump (Dec 2024). Three mentions across 26 months: by the vault's own promotion rule, <a href="#" class="mind-link" data-node-id="concepts/dream-app">dream app</a> should be a real concept page. It's still a stub. The persistence is the data — your subconscious keeps re-suggesting it.
  • OEBVS cold email — Dec 19, 2022 (2022 12 19 oebvs oregon crypto lead). Your first documented cold email into a real Oregon crypto org (rga.com contact). No reply. You pivoted into osig in Feb 2023 and never re-prospected institutional Oregon crypto.
  • The BCI/brainwave thread is older than you remember. Aug 6, 2019 — "Begin and advance ideas: wireless charging, economy, brain wave bs." Three years later, Sept 15, 2022 — "Can essentially read peoples minds. Can't let the government access this tech." A 7-year, three-touch unnamed thread the vault hasn't synthesized.

The question worth sitting with

Why did the operationally-most-specified founder-thread of your 2022–2023 era fail to survive contact with senior year + China? Was Té Amo always emotional rather than commercial — anchored on Talavera ceramics and a Mexican-American third-place vibe rather than a market wedge? If yes, you can finally release it. If no, it's the that would activate fastest if Rankett ever hits a runway moment, because the spec is already written.

Sources

  • 2023 12 29 te amo tea and art house — research dump, LA permitting + suppliers + ceramics
  • 2023 12 30 current thoughts on te amo tea and art house — operational plan, partner + menu + pricing + GTM
  • 2025 06 22 wedding list for now — Jacoby reappears, but as Valeria's partner not co-operator
  • 2025 06 29 uclamphmissiondraft — Jacoby reappears as essay reviewer
  • forgotten thread from 2022 2023 — prior compounding-intelligence answer (COBOL thread)
  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream · 2023 05 13 ideas startup dump · 2024 12 28 ideas dump — dream-app three-mention chain
  • 2022 12 19 oebvs oregon crypto lead — first crypto cold email
  • 2019 08 06 read books wireless charging brain waves · 2022 09 15 mount rushmore bci — BCI thread origin + restate
  • Concepts: 60 day activation rule · stub creation threshold
  • Project page: te amo (stub created today)
